## Security checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, or passwords
- [ ] No `.env`, credentials, or private key files added
- [ ] Any new Supabase tables have RLS enabled with appropriate policies
- [ ] No `service_role` key used in client (iOS/web) code
- [ ] CI secret scanner (`gitleaks`) passes
